metadata.title: Info for Investors | Meezan Bank
metadata.description: Meezan Bank is Pakistan’s first and largest Islamic bank and a publicly listed company. It is one of the fastest growing financial institutions in the banking sector of the country.

content: Meezan EBiz+ LITE Login Meezan EBiz+ Login EBiz+ LITE Login EBiz+ Login اردو Investor Information Investor Relations Financial Information Investor Information Corporate / Analyst Briefing Contact Information If you found this page informative, share it now! Facebook LinkedIn X WhatsApp Email Print Meezan Bank is Pakistan’s first and largest Islamic bank and a publicly listed company with a paid-up capital of Rs. 18 billion. It is one of the fastest growing financial institutions in the banking sector of the country. Read more about the Bank's Vision & Mission, structure, major shareholders and management. Status of the Company Public Company Listed on Pakistan Stock Exchange (PSX) SECP Registration Number (CUIN) 0037618 National Tax Number (NTN) 0787226-7 Subsidiaries Al Meezan Investment Management Limited Meezan Exchange Company (Pvt) Limited SBP Licence No. BL-01 Date of issuance 31st January, 2002 Funds Equity Funds - Al Meezan Mutual Fund - Meezan Islamic Fund - Meezan Energy Fund - Meezan Dedicated Equity Fund Income Funds - Meezan Islamic Income Fund - Meezan Sovereign Fund Money Market Funds - Meezan Cash Fund - Meezan Rozana Amdani Fund Index Tracker Fund - KSE Meezan Index Fund Balanced Fund - Meezan Balanced Fund Asset Allocation Fund - Meezan Asset Allocation Fund Commodities - Meezan Gold Fund of Funds Scheme - Meezan Financial Planning Fund of Funds - Savings Plan - Meezan Strategic Allocation Fund Meezan Strategic Allocation Plan-I Meezan Strategic Allocation Plan-II Meezan Strategic Allocation Plan-III Meezan Strategic Allocation Plan-IV Meezan Strategic Allocation Plan-V MSAF – Meezan Capital Preservation Plan -III Strategic Allocation Fund - II MSAF-II Capital Preservation Plan –IV Capital Preservation Plan –V Capital Preservation Plan –VI Capital Preservation Plan –VII Capital Preservation Plan -VIII Pension Scheme - Meezan Tahaffuz Pension Fund Equity Sub Fund Debt Sub Fund Money Market Sub Fund Gold Sub Fund Registered Office & Head Office Address Meezan House, C-25, Estate Avenue, SITE, Karachi - Pakistan. 24/7 Call Center: 111-331-331 & 111-331-332 PABX: (92-21) 38103500 Fax: (92-21) 36406023 Email : info@meezanbank.com Symbol of Meezan Bank at Pakistan Stock Exchange MEBL www.psx.com.pk Annual Reports Financial Highlights Interim Accounts Financial Ratios Shares Registrar THK Associates (Pvt.) Ltd. Registered Address: Plot No. 32-C, Jami Commercial Street 2, D.H.A., Phase VII, Karachi-75500, Pakistan.
